subcodes.first_line: O thou respected maidservant of God! Thou hast written that since two years
subcodes.subjects: @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @harmony of science and religion, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
